name: muffle-platform
description: A comprehensive social music platform featuring Rooms and Threads experiences, built with React and modern web technologies.

scripts.build:rooms: cd apps/rooms && npm install --production=false && npm run build
scripts.build:threads: cd apps/threads && npm install --production=false && npm run build
scripts.build:timeline: cd apps/timeline && npm install --production=false && npm run build
scripts.build: npm run build:rooms && npm run build:threads && npm run build:timeline
